disambiguation.title: Did you mean?
disambiguation.subtitle: We found multiple matches. Pick the right one.

results.notFound: We couldn't find this song on other platforms.
error.offline: Looks like you're offline. Check your connection and try again.
error.timeout: This is taking longer than usual. Please try again.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.genericWithCode: Something went wrong. Please try again. ({code})
errorCodes.MC-URL-0001: This URL isn't supported. Try a link from Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, Tidal, Deezer, SoundCloud, or another supported service. ({code})
errorCodes.MC-URL-0002: This doesn't look like a music link. Try pasting a link from a supported service. ({code})
errorCodes.MC-URL-0003: That URL looks malformed. Please paste the full link from the streaming service. ({code})
errorCodes.MC-URL-0004: Playlists aren't supported yet. Paste a link to a single track or album instead. ({code})
errorCodes.MC-URL-0005: Podcasts aren't resolved yet. Paste a link to a single track, album, or artist instead. ({code})
errorCodes.MC-URL-0006: Try pasting a link to a specific song or open the album page and share from there. ({code})
errorCodes.MC-URL-0007: This service is currently disabled. Please try a link from another service. ({code})
errorCodes.MC-RES-0001: This track doesn't seem to be available anymore on the source service. ({code})
errorCodes.MC-RES-0002: We couldn't find this on other services. It may be exclusive to the source. ({code})
errorCodes.MC-API-0001: One of the services is temporarily unavailable. Please try again. ({code})
errorCodes.MC-API-0002: All services are currently unreachable. Please try again in a few minutes. ({code})
errorCodes.MC-API-0003: Too many requests. You can make {limit} requests per {windowSeconds} seconds. Please try again in {retryAfterSeconds} seconds. ({code})
errorCodes.MC-API-0004: Something went wrong talking to a service. Please try again. ({code})
errorCodes.MC-API-0005: This is taking longer than usual. Please try again. ({code})
